When Venus occupies the star Hasta, the people of the Kuru
country as well as artists i.e. painters, will be in trouble, and there
will be drought. When he occupies the star GitrS, there will be
good rains, but birds and labourers engaged in the sinking of wells
will suffer.
When Venus passes through SvatT, there will be good
rains, but messengers, traders and sailors will be in trouble. In
Vi§akha Venus would cause beneficial rainfall as well as threat to
merchants.

108 Bfhat Samhiid,
TO gfrswt I
When Venus ts in Anuradhs, there will be hostility among
the K§atriyas; when he is in Jyestha, leaders of Ksatriyas will be
in jeopardy; and when he is in Mula, druggists (those who deal in
medicinal roots) and physicians will be harmed. In addition, there
will be drought resulting from his transit through all the three
stars (mentioned here).
